mapper.select: SELECT total_use_count, total_carbon_saved, total_station_count, avg_use_time, top_district, created_at FROM bike_kpi ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT id, month, total_use_cnt, total_station_cnt, created_at FROM bike_monthly_summary ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT id, month, weekday, total_use_cnt, created_at FROM bike_weekday_summary ORDER BY CASE weekday WHEN '월' THEN 1 WHEN '화' THEN 2 WHEN '수' THEN 3 WHEN '목' THEN 4 WHEN '금' THEN 5 WHEN '토' THEN 6 WHEN '일' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END

SELECT id, month, age_group, total_use_cnt, created_at FROM bike_age_group_summary ORDER BY CASE age_group WHEN '~10대' THEN 1 WHEN '20대' THEN 2 WHEN '30대' THEN 3 WHEN '40대' THEN 4 WHEN '50대' THEN 5 WHEN '60대' THEN 6 WHEN '70대~' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END
SELECT id, month, district, total_use_cnt, created_at FROM bike_district_summary ORDER BY total_use_cnt DESC
SELECT id, month, rent_type, total_use_cnt, created_at FROM bike_rent_type_summary ORDER BY total_use_cnt DESC
